searchDocs.title: byName​
searchDocs.content: </> Bootstrapper.byName( matchName: string-- The string pattern to match against the module's name. ) → Predicate Creates a predicate function that matches a module's name against a string.

searchDocs.title: loadChildren​
searchDocs.content: This is a yielding function. When called, it will pause the Lua thread that called the function until a result is ready to be returned, without interrupting other scripts. Yields </> Bootstrapper.loadChildren( parent: Instance ,-- The Instance to search within. predicate:: Predicate?-- Filter ) → LoadedModules,Errors?-- (LoadedModules, Errors) Requires all direct child ModuleScripts within a given parent. Returns an array of loaded modules to guarantee order execution.

searchDocs.title: loadDescendants​
searchDocs.content: This is a yielding function. When called, it will pause the Lua thread that called the function until a result is ready to be returned, without interrupting other scripts. Yields </> Bootstrapper.loadDescendants( parent: Instance ,-- The Instance to search within. predicate:: Predicate?-- Filter ) → LoadedModules,Errors?-- (LoadedModules, Errors) Requires all descendant ModuleScripts within a given parent. Returns an array of loaded modules to guarantee order execution.

searchDocs.title: loadSequence​
searchDocs.content: This is a yielding function. When called, it will pause the Lua thread that called the function until a result is ready to be returned, without interrupting other scripts. Yields </> Bootstrapper.loadSequence( modules: ModuleScripts,-- Array of ModuleScripts. predicate:: Predicate?-- Filter ) → LoadedModules,Errors?-- (LoadedModules, Errors) Requires specific modules in a guaranteed sequence array.

searchDocs.title: callSync​
searchDocs.content: This is a yielding function. When called, it will pause the Lua thread that called the function until a result is ready to be returned, without interrupting other scripts. Yields </> Bootstrapper.callSync( modules: LoadedModules | ModuleScripts,-- The array of loaded modules or ModuleScripts. methodName: string,-- The method to execute. Prefix with '.' for static calls or ':' for object methods. ...: any-- Additional arguments to pass to the method. ) → LoadedModules,Errors?-- (LoadedModules, Errors) Executes a method on all modules and yields the calling thread until all modules have finished. Returns the succesful modules array, and a map of errors.

searchDocs.title: callAsync​
searchDocs.content: </> Bootstrapper.callAsync( modules: LoadedModules | ModuleScripts,-- The array of loaded modules or ModuleScripts. methodName: string,-- The method to execute. Prefix with '.' for static calls or ':' for object methods. ...: any-- Additional arguments to pass to the method. ) → () Executes a method on all modules asynchronously using task.spawn (Fire and forget). Catches and logs errors safely to prevent thread crashing.

searchDocs.title: bindTo​
searchDocs.content: </> Bootstrapper.bindTo( modules: LoadedModules | ModuleScripts,-- The array of loaded modules or ModuleScripts. methodName: string,-- The method to execute. Prefix with '.' for static calls or ':' for object methods. event: Event-- A Signal or a subscription function. ) → Cleanup-- A uniform cleanup function to disconnect the event. Binds a method across all modules to a Signal, Custom Signal, or Callback Subscription.

searchDocs.title: bindToHeartbeat​
searchDocs.content: </> Bootstrapper.bindToHeartbeat( modules: LoadedModules | ModuleScripts,-- The array of loaded modules or ModuleScripts methodName: string-- The method to execute. Prefix with '.' for static calls or ':' for object methods. ) → Cleanup Hooks a specified method in all modules to RunService.Heartbeat.

searchDocs.title: bindToRenderStep​
searchDocs.content: This item only works when running on the client. Client </> Bootstrapper.bindToRenderStep( modules: LoadedModules | ModuleScripts,-- The array of loaded modules or ModuleScripts methodName: string,-- The method to execute. Prefix with '.' for static calls or ':' for object methods. priority: number? ) → Cleanup Hooks a specified method in all modules to RunService.RenderStepped or RunService:BindToRenderStep if a priority is given.

searchDocs.title: bindToPreSimulation​
searchDocs.content: </> Bootstrapper.bindToPreSimulation( modules: LoadedModules | ModuleScripts,-- The array of loaded modules or ModuleScripts methodName: string,-- The method to execute. Prefix with '.' for static calls or ':' for object methods. frequency: Enum.StepFrequency? ) → Cleanup Hooks a specified method in all modules to RunService.PreSimulation or RunService:BindToSimulation if a frequency is given.

searchDocs.title: bindToPostSimulation​
searchDocs.content: </> Bootstrapper.bindToPostSimulation( modules: LoadedModules | ModuleScripts,-- The array of loaded modules or ModuleScripts methodName: string-- The method to execute. Prefix with '.' for static calls or ':' for object methods. ) → Cleanup Hooks a specified method in all modules to RunService.PostSimulation.

searchDocs.title: bindToPreAnimation​
searchDocs.content: </> Bootstrapper.bindToPreAnimation( modules: LoadedModules | ModuleScripts,-- The array of loaded modules or ModuleScripts methodName: string-- The method to execute. Prefix with '.' for static calls or ':' for object methods. ) → Cleanup Hooks a specified method in all modules to RunService.PreAnimation.

searchDocs.title: bindToPreRender​
searchDocs.content: This item only works when running on the client. Client </> Bootstrapper.bindToPreRender( modules: LoadedModules | ModuleScripts,-- The array of loaded modules or ModuleScripts methodName: string-- The method to execute. Prefix with '.' for static calls or ':' for object methods.. ) → Cleanup Hooks a specified method in all modules to RunService.PreRender.

searchDocs.title: Features​
searchDocs.content: Predictable Flow: Load modules in a deterministically sorted order (alphabetical) or define a strict manual sequence.Event Binding: Connect modules directly to RunService events or custom signals.Method Call Syntax: Use standard Lua syntax (. vs :) in your method names to explicitly call static functions or object methods.Memory Profiling: Automatically assigns debug.setmemorycategory to every module's thread and RunService loop.

searchDocs.title: Wally​
searchDocs.content: Add this to your wally.toml:  ldgerrits/bootstrapper@^1.0.13

searchDocs.title: 1. Finding & Loading Modules​
searchDocs.content: Load modules from a folder. Bootstrapper automatically requires them and returns a deterministically sorted array (alphabetical by Name), ensuring your game starts the same way every time.  local Bootstrapper = require(path.to.Bootstrapper) local services, errors = Bootstrapper.loadDescendants(path.to.Services, Bootstrapper.byName('Service$'))

searchDocs.title: 2. Manual Sequences​
searchDocs.content: You can use loadSequence to define a manual order using an array ModuleScript instances. This sequence can be stored and reused for all lifecycle stages.  local services, errors = Bootstrapper.loadSequence({ path.to.DataService, path.to.PlayerService, path.to.AssetService, }) -- Use the resulting services array for everything else Bootstrapper.callSync(services, '.init')

searchDocs.title: 3. Dot vs. Colon Notation​
searchDocs.content: When passing a method name to any Bootstrapper function, you can dictate how the function is executed:  'init' (Default): Calls as an object method. module:init() ':init' (Explicit OOP): Calls as an object method. module:init() '.init' (Static): Calls as a static function. module.init()  -- Injects 'self' into every module's 'onUpdate' method Bootstrapper.bindToHeartbeat(services, ':onUpdate') -- Calls 'tick' statically, without passing the module table Bootstrapper.bindToHeartbeat(services, '.tick')

searchDocs.title: 4. Lazy Resolution​
searchDocs.content: You don't have to call a 'load' function. You can also just pass an array of ModuleScripts directly to events, and the Bootstrapper will handle the require() and memory profiling for you automatically.  -- This works even if the modules haven't been required yet Bootstrapper.bindToHeartbeat({ path.to.CombatService, path.to.VFXService, }, 'onUpdate')

searchDocs.title: 5. Lifecycles​
searchDocs.content: Trigger methods across your modules. callSync yields the current thread until all modules finish, while callAsync fires them in background threads.  -- Yields until every module's `.init` function returns -- Only modules that successfully finish '.init' are returned local services, errors = Bootstrapper.callSync(services, '.init') -- Fire '.start' methods without yielding -- You can pass arguments like 'gameData' here! Bootstrapper.callAsync(services, '.start', gameData)

searchDocs.title: 6. Event Binding​
searchDocs.content: Route RunService events or signals directly to module methods. All binding functions follow the same signature: (modules, methodName, [context]).  local cleanupHeartbeat = Bootstrapper.bindToHeartbeat(services, 'onHeartbeat') local cleanupRenderStep = Bootstrapper.bindToRenderStep(services, 'onRender', Enum.RenderPriority.Last.Value) local cleanupGameState = Bootstrapper.bindTo(services, 'onGameState', GameState.Changed) -- Disconnect everything when they are no longer needed cleanupHeartbeat() cleanupRenderStep() cleanupGameState()
